{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125118CE986EA2AC66C31D6403"}"},"total":365},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7410860257567654718","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"豪堪，作者更新很勤，主角是一颗小太阳，照亮鬼灭的所有人，鬼中只有三哥哈，系统也很可爱，所有人都是小蛋糕呢！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725493486,"group_id":"7381084788129549374","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"青龙啊，岂是池中物","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/lCLJUSEfYsjXictSAP1Ykftwa4t8hQeNbO/gvww0hi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/65bd68d92fb148e69480b14b3135a2d8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620278&x-signature=EStDBRE6wZ8QweBTB%2BI1PQLaDsw%3D","user_id":"1275021218809843","user_name":"初雪寻猫迹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1275021218809843","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7381084788129549374","book_info":{"abstract":"【动漫衍生、双男、双洁、马甲多】柱包活
除原作主线外，会有不少原创故事，以拯救任务为主要核心。
超轻松的穿越任务，超佛系的宿主，超新的大统子。
叶歌（受），男，20岁时因病逝世，再次睁眼就进入了《鬼灭之刃》的世界中，成为了半人半鬼的存在。
第一次做系统的原色大金属球将任务告诉叶歌：在不影响主线和大结局的情况下，尽可能的救下观众心中不舍的人类方角色。
“你这么说我可就不客气了。”
我不仅要救人，我还要把富冈义勇拐跑。
